callGraph.callee: new Date(year, month - 1, day, hour, minute, 0).getTime

[
      `计划进度: ${done + failed + skipped}/${states.length} 完成`,
      `- 已完成: ${done}`,
      `- 执行中: ${running}`,
      `- 待处理: ${pending}`,
      `- 失败: ${failed}`,
      `- 跳过: ${skipped}`,
      ...(failed > 0 ? ["", "失败任务:"] : []),
      ...this.getFailedTasks().map((t) => `  - ${t.description}: ${t.error}`),
    ].join
